message:
⚡ Race all CRD/deployment checks in parallel for fast fail (#2565)

Instead of sequential CRD checks (3 × 5s each) then sequential
deployment checks (3 × 5s each) = up to 30s per cluster, now all 6
checks run in parallel via Promise.allSettled. Non-installed clusters
resolve in ~3s instead of 30s. Reduced timeout from 5s to 3s since
missing CRD queries fail near-instantly on reachable clusters.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
